name: Chocolate-Covered Bugs
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking sheet with waxed paper.
2. Cut the red licorice into small pieces.
3. Flatten each caramel candy using your hands.
4. Press bits of licorice onto 12 of the flattened caramels to make legs.
5. Top each legged caramel with a second caramel and press edges together to seal.
6. Place the decorated candies on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Put chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl.
8. Microwave on High for 1 minute, stirring then microwave for 1 minute longer.
9. Remove from oven and stir until melted.
10. Spoon melted chocolate over each candy.
11. Decorate with nuts and assorted candies.
Time: 1 hour, 40 minutes (Total)
